testing_centers.notes: In-person and online proctored (OnVUE). CISSP is Computer Adaptive Testing (CAT).

id_requirements: One valid, government-issued photo ID with full name, photo, and signature. Name must match exactly as registered. Foreign nationals: passport required.
exam_rules: No personal items in testing room. Scratch paper provided. No food, drinks (except clear water in clear container), or breaks for shorter exams. CISSP: optional scheduled break at question 100.
renewal_options: Earn CPE (Continuing Professional Education) credits and pay Annual Maintenance Fee (AMF). AMF is $125/year. CPE credits through education, contributions to the field, or unique work experience.

prerequisites.description: 1 year of cumulative paid work experience in 1 or more of the 7 SSCP CBK domains

retake_policy.notes: 30-day waiting period after first failed attempt. 90-day waiting period after second failed attempt. Maximum 3 attempts in a 12-month period. Full exam fee required for each retake.

official_study_resources.title: ISC2 Official Study Guide
official_study_resources.notes: Official CBK training, self-paced and instructor-led options
